VINDerived.ActiveSafetySysNote: Blind Spot Detection: Optional for LE and SE trims, Standard for XLE, XLE V6, XSE, XSE V6 trims; Automatic Crash Notification: Optional for LE, XLE, SE, XSE trims, Standard for XLE V6 and XSE V6 trims
